overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a forested mountain trail at night. The camera follows smoothly as the character travels along a winding dirt path toward a large snow-capped mountain, passing through varying densities of pine forest and along cliff edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest meadow with mountain view

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at steady pace along a dirt trail through open forest toward a distant snow-capped mountain

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak dominating the horizon ahead
dense pine trees lining the left side of the trail
dense pine trees lining the right side of the trail
grassy areas alongside the dirt trail
grassy areas alongside the dirt trail
winding dirt path through the forest

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of a forest trail at night, with a massive snow-capped mountain visible in the distance ahead. The camera follows the character riding a horse along a dirt path bordered by grass meadows and coniferous trees on both sides. The sky is clear and dark, with the mountain illuminated against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with cliff overlook

events.description: path curves left entering denser forest with thicker tree coverage
terrain drops off to the right revealing a valley or cliff edge

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride along the winding trail as it curves through denser forest terrain

entered.detail: steep drop-off or cliff edge visible to the right of the path
deep valley or ravine below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The trail curves left into a denser section of forest where the trees grow closer together, partially obscuring the sky. The snow-capped mountain shifts to the left side of the frame as the path winds. A rocky cliff and valley dropoff become visible on the right side, adding vertical drama to the terrain while the character continues riding forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside trail with stone wall barrier

events.description: path now runs alongside a stone wall on the right with cliff dropoff beyond

agents.ego_description: riding along a narrow cliffside path bordered by a stone wall on the right

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the right edge of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path continues along a cliff edge, now protected by a stone wall on the right side. The snow-capped mountain gradually moves back to the center of the view as the trail curves. The forest remains dense on the left while the right side offers a view of the valley below, creating a sense of height and exposure.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain approach trail with wooden fencing

events.description: horse rears up or jumps over an obstacle on the path

agents.ego_description: riding toward the mountain base, navigating a brief obstacle where the horse rears

entered.detail: simple wooden fence posts replacing the stone wall along the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the mountain base, with the snow-capped peak now dominating the center view. The stone wall gives way to a simpler wooden fence on the right. At around 48 seconds, the horse briefly rears up or jumps over an obstacle. The trail continues through dense forest toward the towering mountain ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding mountain trail at night, transitioning from an open forest path toward the imposing base of a snow-capped peak. It begins with a wide view of a dirt path bordered by grass meadows and coniferous trees, with the illuminated mountain centered in the distance under a clear dark sky. As the trail curves left, the forest densifies and the mountain shifts to the side, revealing a dramatic rocky cliff and valley dropoff on the right. The scene then shifts as the path hugs the cliff edge behind a protective stone wall, with the mountain gradually returning to the center of the frame while the valley remains exposed to the right. Finally, the stone wall gives way to a wooden fence as the horse briefly rears over an obstacle, moving through the thick forest toward the towering peak that now dominates the view.
